articles.title: Woman arrested in Yishun for alleged sale of counterfeit goods online worth over $34k
articles.content: Police said on Friday night that the items seized, with an estimated street value of over $34,000, included accessories, apparels, footwear, luxury bags, sunglasses, watches and wallets. They added members of the public that the distribution and sale of counterfeit goods, including through online platforms, are serious offences. Investigations into the woman are ongoing
